issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Build a phone-answering voice agent that uses Deepgram STT, GPT-4o, and ElevenLabs TTS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires up `VoiceAssistant` from livekit-agents with Silero VAD prewarm, the deepgram/openai/elevenlabs plugins, and a `cli.run_app(WorkerOptions(...))` entrypoint; baseline stitches raw WebSocket + provider APIs together and misses the Agents framework entirely.

scenarios.name: Route inbound Twilio SIP calls into a LiveKit room per call so an AI agent can answer
scenarios.rationale: Treatment creates a `SIPInboundTrunkInfo` via `lk.sip.create_sip_inbound_trunk` and a `SIPDispatchRuleIndividual` with `room_prefix`, giving each call its own room; baseline configures Twilio TwiML/Media Streams and never touches the LiveKit SIP API.
